company.name: Pune Global Group
company.business: Manufacturer of PP corrugated plastic packaging (boxes, trays, bins, separators, layer pads, ESD packaging) and authorised trader of premium paper & board grades (ITC PSPD, TNPL, imported). Serves automotive, pharma, FMCG, electronics, and export industries across India.
company.brand_tone: Premium, editorial, industrial. Warm cream/charcoal palette. Serif display headings. Not consumer — B2B.

/.title: Homepage
/.description: Full-screen hero carousel (10 images), services overview, client industries, contact form. Hero images rotate across factory, machines, products and facility shots.

/products.title: Products Index
/products.description: Two-panel split: PP Corrugated Systems (navy) vs Paper & Board Grades (cream). Each panel is a full-bleed image card linking to its sub-page.

/products/pp-corrugated.title: PP Corrugated Systems
/products/pp-corrugated.description: Hero + product family grid (foldable boxes, corrugated sheets, layer pads, crates, ESD packaging). 3 images per product sub-category.

/products/paper-board.title: Paper & Board Grades
/products/paper-board.description: Hero + product family grid (FBB, duplex board, kraft liner, test liner). 3 images per grade.

/infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
/infrastructure.description: Six converting machines each with wide / detail / operation shots. Facility section with 6 photos showing Indian diverse workers (majority female).

/blog.title: Insights Blog
/blog.description: 14 editorial articles on packaging industry topics. Each article has a cover image.

pp_material_rules.WHAT_IT_IS: Polypropylene (PP) twinwall / twin-flute corrugated plastic sheet — rigid flat plastic board 3–10mm thick with hollow rectangular channels (flutes) running through it. Brand references: Coroplast, Correx, Twinwall, Corflute.
pp_material_rules.CONSTRUCTION: Products are made by CUTTING flat PP twinwall sheet on a die-cutting punch press, then FOLDING/BENDING the sheet at scored lines and joining corners with metal RIVETS or ULTRASONIC WELDING. Finished products have: flat smooth panels, sharp 90-degree fold lines, metal rivets or weld points at corners, hollow flute channels visible on any cut edge.
pp_material_rules.VISUAL_IDENTIFIERS: Smooth flat matte plastic surface (not wavy, not ribbed, not shiny). Hollow rectangular channels visible on cut edges. Metal rivet heads at corners. Fold/crease lines on panel faces. Common colours: grey, black, blue, yellow, white.
NEVER_GENERATE: Injection-moulded plastic bins with external ribbing (Euro containers, Stemo bins, Georg Utz style)
Corrugated cardboard / kraft paper / brown wavy-flute packaging
Arc welding / MIG welding / handheld heat guns / sparks / flames
Solid plastic walls with no flute structure
pp_material_rules.ALWAYS_SAY_IN_PROMPT: PP corrugated twin-wall plastic. Hollow single-flute polypropylene sheet. Flat panel construction with metal rivets. NOT cardboard. NOT injection moulded. NOT kraft paper.

style_guides.machine_shots: No people. No animals. No food. No nature scenery. Only industrial machines. Professional industrial product photography. Ultra sharp. 4K photorealistic. 50mm lens. 5200K LED lighting.
style_guides.facility_shots: Photorealistic 4K photo. Indian manufacturing facility. Diverse Indian workers including majority women in orange safety vests and white helmets. Candid professional workplace photography. Bright 5200K LED lighting. Clean factory.
style_guides.hero_shots: Ultra high resolution photorealistic photography. Professional commercial photography. Cinematic quality. Highly detailed.
style_guides.pp_prefix: MATERIAL: All packaging shown is rigid polypropylene (PP) twin-wall corrugated plastic sheet — hollow single-flute, flat panel, metal rivets at corners, fold lines visible. NOT cardboard. NOT injection moulded. NOT kraft.

images.prompt: Ultra high resolution photorealistic photography. Professional commercial photography. Cinematic quality. Highly detailed. Aerial wide-angle photo of a modern Indian industrial packaging factory at golden hour. Clean white building facade, company name on building, loading bay with trucks, green landscaping, dramatic orange sky. Corporate architecture photography.

Ultra high resolution photorealistic photography. Professional commercial photography. Cinematic quality. Highly detailed. Inside a large modern Indian automotive assembly plant. Rows of car body frames on a lit production line. Indian workers in blue uniforms. Grey and black PP corrugated packaging trays and boxes visible on the line. Blue-white factory lighting. Cinematic wide shot.

Ultra high resolution photorealistic photography. Professional commercial photography. Cinematic quality. Highly detailed. Photorealistic 4K photo. Indian manufacturing facility. Diverse Indian workers including women in orange safety vests and white helmets. Candid professional workplace photography. Bright LED lighting. Clean factory. Wide panoramic shot of a PP corrugated box manufacturing facility. Multiple industrial machines — punch press, screen printer, sheeter — arranged on a factory floor. Indian female and male workers operating machines. Yellow floor safety markings. Very wide angle.

Ultra high resolution photorealistic photography. Professional commercial photography. Cinematic quality. Highly detailed. Elegant flat-lay overhead product photography of premium paper and board grades. Stacked FBB folding boxboard sheets, white duplex board, cream kraft liner arranged in layers on a white marble surface. Soft even studio lighting with clean shadow. Minimalist, ultra sharp.
